title: Knysna women's cricket team defeat Dysselsdorp
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The defending champions of the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The defending champions of the SWD Division 1 Women's competition, Union Stars, recorded a nail-biting one-wicket victory against Pacaltsdorp this past Saturday.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The defending champions of the SWD Division 1 Women's competition, Union Stars, recorded a nail-biting one-wicket victory against Pacaltsdorp this past Saturday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars, who have won the title for nine consecutive years, will aim to make it 10 out of 10 when they take on George in the final at the Recreation Ground on Saturday.","html":"Union Stars, who have won the title for nine consecutive years, will aim to make it 10 out of 10 when they take on George in the final at the Recreation Ground on Saturday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna women's cricket team defeated Dysselsdorp by a massive 151 runs.","html":"Knysna women's cricket team defeated Dysselsdorp by a massive 151 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarised scorecards for the weekend are:","html":"The summarised scorecards for the weekend are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Women's Division 1","html":"Women's Division 1"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United vs Union Stars","html":"Pacaltsdorp United vs Union Stars"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United 133 all out (35.1 overs)","html":"Pacaltsdorp United 133 all out (35.1 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars 134/9 (23.3 overs)","html":"Union Stars 134/9 (23.3 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars won by 1 wicket.","html":"Union Stars won by 1 wicket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George vs Sussex","html":"George vs Sussex"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex 37 all out (14 overs)","html":"Sussex 37 all out (14 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George 38/0 (3.5 overs)","html":"George 38/0 (3.5 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George won by 10 wickets.","html":"George won by 10 wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Women's Division 2","html":"Women's Division 2"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers vs Dysseldorp","html":"Knysna Cavaliers vs Dysseldorp"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers 162 all out (21 overs)","html":"Knysna Cavaliers 162 all out (21 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dysselsdorp 11 all out (4.1 overs)","html":"Dysselsdorp 11 all out (4.1 overs)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers won by 151 runs.","html":"Knysna Cavaliers won by 151 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa,
